cards.afterText: If Flash started this turn in a different space, place him in a vacant starting space.
cards.title: Born to run

cards.duringText: ⚡️Reduce the opponent's printed value by their MOVE.
cards.title: Blink of an eye

cards.afterText: Move both fighters in the combat up to 3 spaces.⚡️You may end the turn.
cards.title: Unforgiving Minute

cards.afterText: Draw 2 cards.⚡️If this was played as an attack, gain an action.
cards.title: Chain Lightning

cards.afterText:
Take 1 damage and deal 2 damage to the opposing fighter.
⚡️Instead, deal 1 damage to all adjacent opposing fighters.
cards.title: Terminal Velocity

cards.basicText: Choose an opponent and name a value.  Gain health equal to the amount of cards in their hand with that value. If they do not have a card of the named value, they must reveal their hand instead.
cards.title: Into the multiverse

cards.basicText: Place Flash anywhere in his zone. Gain an action.⚡️Gain 2 actions instead.
cards.title: SPeed Formula

cards.basicText: This card may be played from spaces away equal to your MOVE.
cards.immediateText: Cancel all effects on your opponent's card. ⚡️And reduce the printed value to 0.
cards.title: speed Blitz

cards.afterText: ⚡️Remain in the SPEED FORCE until the start of your next turn.
cards.duringText: Add the opponent's MOVE to the value of this card.
cards.title: The Fastest man alive

cards.afterText: Move your fighter up to 4 spaces.
cards.title: Swift Strike

cards.afterText: ⚡️You may not enter the SPEED FORCE on your next turn.
cards.duringText: + 1 to this card for every unique space Flash was in this turn.
cards.title: Infinite Mass Punch

hero.name: The Flash
hero.specialAbility:
If Flash BOOSTs a maneuver, enter the SPEED FORCE. 
When Flash is in the SPEED FORCE, resolve all⚡️effects.
At the end of your turn, exit the SPEED FORCE.

ruleCards.content:
Use this token to keep track of Speed Force status.

When Flash is in the SPEED FORCE, resolve all ⚡️ effects. These effects can still be cancelled
ruleCards.title: Speed Force Token

name: The Flash
note: v2 is Fighter 2 of the DC reskin set. v3 is an original fighter. v7 is the final arted version.
